_comment: Frozen v1/v2/v3 evidence for golden regression tests (T096). These are stable, hand-authored stand-ins for the baseline clips so the tone-bearing surfaces (prompt assembly, fallback text) can be pinned without network or model runs. Do not edit casually: changing evidence invalidates the golden files.

v1.transcript: A chef slices vegetables on a wooden board while explaining the recipe.

v3.transcript: The presenter walks through the city square pointing at the old clock tower, then greets a street vendor selling roasted chestnuts near the fountain.
